data.body:
OVERLAY CATALOG — API compatibility / backwards-compat
- Source (all permissive): buf breaking (Apache; proto tiered WIRE/WIRE_JSON/PACKAGE/FILE), oasdiff (Apache; OpenAPI), graphql-js findSchemaChanges (MIT; Breaking/Dangerous/Non-breaking), Griffe (ISC; Python), cargo-semver-checks (Apache/MIT; Rust), japicmp/revapi (Apache; Java), api-extractor (MIT; TS); standards SemVer/Conventional-Commits/Google AIP-180/181/185.
- Dimensions: A) symbol existence (removal/rename); B) signature/shape (param removed/reordered/kind; NEW REQUIRED param=silent breaker; type change; cardinality); C) return/output contract (narrowed return; removed response property/status); D) enum (removed=breaking; ADDED=dangerous); E) wire/serialization tier (severity modifier); F) validation/semantics tightening (changed default=dangerous; SAME-SIGNATURE-CHANGED-BEHAVIOR = LLM-only); G) deprecation/versioning correctness (MAJOR taken? Conventional-Commits flagged? deprecation-before-removal? reserve-not-reuse).
- Severity vocab: adopt BREAKING/DANGEROUS/NON_BREAKING/INFO (graphql-js) + ERR/WARN (oasdiff); DANGEROUS/WARN routes to the LLM verifier.
- Triggers: *.proto/buf.yaml; openapi*/swagger*; *.graphql/*.gql; version-field bumps; api-extractor *.api.md; *.pyi/*.d.ts/__all__. Semantic: exported-symbol diff (preferred).
- Base-escalation CRITICAL for: same-signature-changed-behavior, hand-rolled HTTP/RPC w/o schema artifact, config-as-API.
- LICENSE: all permissive, no blockers. FLAG: no LLM rubric exists -> author original; tools miss some dims (Griffe return-type, cargo-semver-checks signatures) -> LLM/escalation.
